title: BPARequestStatus
description: BPARequestStatus schema from Palo Alto Networks AIOps for NGFW BPA API

request_id.description: Unique identifier of the BPA request.

serial_number.description: Device serial number for which the assessment was submitted.

status.description: Current processing status of the request.

report_id.description: Report identifier available when status is completed. Use with GET /reports/{report_id} to retrieve the full report.

error_message.description: Error description when status is failed.

submitted_at.description: Timestamp when the request was submitted.
